response:
Assessment: Istio Service Mesh Health

Summary
- Control plane: Healthy
  - istiod 1.28.0 in istio-system is Healthy
- Data plane: Healthy
  - Monitored namespaces: bookinfo (HEALTHY), default (HEALTHY)
- Observability stack: Partial outage
  - Prometheus: Healthy
  - Jaeger: Healthy
  - Grafana: Unreachable (dashboards unavailable)

Evidence
- Control plane
  - istio-system/istiod status: Healthy, version 1.28.0
- Data plane
  - Monitored namespaces: bookinfo, default — both HEALTHY
- Observability/connectivity
  - Mesh status critical alert: component=Grafana, message="Grafana is Unreachable", impact="Grafana dashboards unavailable"
  - Connectivity graph: istio-system/kiali → Grafana: Unreachable; kiali → istiod/Prometheus/Jaeger: Healthy
  - No Grafana service found in istio-system (services present: istiod, istio-ingressgateway, istio-egressgateway, kiali, prometheus, tracing, zipkin, jaeger-collector)
  - Kiali configuration (ConfigMap istio-system/kiali) has no external_services.grafana section configured; tracing and istio are configured, Grafana is not

Root cause
- Grafana integration is not configured or not installed, causing Kiali to report Grafana as Unreachable and making dashboards unavailable.

Impact and severity
- Medium: Mesh control and data planes are healthy; only Grafana dashboards are unavailable in Kiali.

Next steps
1) If Grafana is intended to be used
   - Install or verify a Grafana instance and expose it via a Service/Route in its namespace.
   - Configure Kiali to point to Grafana:
     - Add external_services.grafana in ConfigMap istio-system/kiali (or Kiali CR if using an operator), for example:
       external_services:
         grafana:
           enabled: true
           in_cluster_url: http://grafana.<namespace>.svc:3000
           url: https://grafana.<route-hostname>
   - Ensure any NetworkPolicy allows traffic from istio-system/kiali to the Grafana Service/Route.

2) If Grafana is not required
   - Disable Grafana integration in Kiali to clear the alert (set external_services.grafana.enabled: false in the Kiali configuration).

Environment details
- istio_version: 1.28.0
- kiali_version: v2.17.0
- trust_domain: cluster.local
- Timestamp: 2026-06-12T13:03:22Z

No other mesh-wide issues detected.
